backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing per-player game state (health, ammunition, score, enemies defeated) with functions to start a game, take damage, recharge weapons, increase score, defeat enemies, and query state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the controls reference panel feature to Game.tsx, listing associated components and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, hooks, styles, and configuration for the Bond-themed 3D shooter game.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Timeless' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping a lazy-loaded Game component with an ErrorBoundary and Suspense fallback using InitialLoadingScreen.
frontend/src/components/Arena.tsx: 3D arena component that loads a skybox texture, creates physics-based floor/walls/obstacles, renders enemies, and fires onArenaLoaded and onEnemiesSpawned callbacks when ready.
frontend/src/components/CanvasErrorFallb: Fallback UI displayed when the WebGL canvas fails to initialize, showing an error message, possible causes, and retry/reload buttons in Bond styling.
frontend/src/components/Enemy.tsx: Individual enemy component using shared geometry/material for performance, physics box collider, userData set for raycast hit detection, and a dynamic health bar above the mesh.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors, releases pointer lock, and displays a Bond-styled error card with optional stack trace and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main game component that composes the 3D Canvas, Physics scene, Arena, Player, and HUD, managing loading stages and a controls panel overlay.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Simple presentational component that renders a percentage-based health bar using current and max values.
frontend/src/components/HUD.tsx: Heads-up display overlay showing score, health bar, ammunition pips, current music track, and a mute toggle button.
frontend/src/components/InitialLoadingSc: Full-screen loading screen with a Bond-themed UI, animated progress bar with a minimum 4.5-second display time, and fade-in effect.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: In-game loading overlay that displays stage labels, a progress bar, retry count, and an error state with a retry button.
frontend/src/components/MuzzleFlash.tsx: Three.js mesh component that renders a textured muzzle flash sprite in front of the camera and fades it out over successive frames.
frontend/src/components/PerformanceOverl: Development-only overlay that displays FPS, frame time, and JS heap memory stats using the usePerformanceMonitor hook.
frontend/src/components/Player.tsx: Physics-based player controller handling movement, pointer-lock mouse look, shooting with raycasting for enemy hit detection, and muzzle flash display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: React hook that manages procedurally generated background music using the Web Audio API, supporting two tracks ('diehard' and 'bond') with mute toggling and automatic track switching based on game state.
frontend/src/hooks/useDependencyCheck.ts: React hook that asynchronously verifies required dependencies (WebGL, Three.js, React Three Fiber, Cannon physics) are available, returning loading/ready/error state with a 10-second timeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnemies.ts: React hook that manages a list of 5 enemies with positions and health, exposing a `damageEnemy` callback that updates health and tracks destruction state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameInitialization: React hook that orchestrates a multi-stage game initialization sequence (canvas, physics, arena, player, enemies), tracking progress, handling per-stage timeouts, and supporting retries on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: React hook that manages local game state (health, ammo, score, enemies defeated) while syncing with a backend via `useBackendGameState`, exposing callbacks for damage, enemy defeat, and ammo decrement.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and context provider that wraps DFINITY's AuthClient to handle Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence, exposing login status flags and the current identity.
frontend/src/hooks/usePerformanceMonitor: A React hook that measures FPS, frame time, and JS heap memory usage using requestAnimationFrame, updating stats every second. Only active in development mode and exposes an exportStats utility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerControls.ts: A React hook that tracks WASD/Space keyboard input and mouse movement via event listeners, storing state in refs for low-latency access. Provides a getMouseMovement function that reads and resets accumulated mouse delta.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines the useGameState hook that wraps React Query to fetch and mutate game state (start, damage, enemy defeat, score, weapon recharge) via a canister actor. Each mutation invalidates the cached game state query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeapon.ts: A React hook managing weapon firing logic with a configurable fire rate, muzzle flash timing via setTimeout, and cleanup of timers on unmount. Returns the current weapon state and a fire callback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports the Cormorant Garamond font and game theme stylesheet, applies Tailwind layers, and defines a James Bond–inspired black/charcoal/gold CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/styles/game-theme.css: Defines the James Bond/Die Hard visual theme with keyframe animations (gun barrel rotation, HUD flicker, muzzle flash, cinematic fade) and reusable CSS classes for HUD panels, loading cards, and the gun barrel loader component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors (gold, charcoal, Bond palette), serif/mono font families, zero border-radius, gold box shadows, and the tailwindcss-animate plugin.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the 007-themed 'Operation Timeless' game, its existing features, and pending action requests including reverting the loading screen to the original Bond gun barrel intro and adding a controls display to the start screen.
